## Summary

Describe the change in 1–3 bullets.

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs / curriculum
- [ ] Tutorial / lab
- [ ] Video script
- [ ] Diagram / asset
- [ ] Website
- [ ] Community / contributor materials
- [ ] Other

## Test plan

- [ ] `website` builds (`cd website && npm run build`)
- [ ] Links checked

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets included (mnemonics, private keys, API keys)
- [ ] Official sources cited (where applicable)
- [ ] Beginner-friendly (clear prerequisites + steps + troubleshooting)
